name: Proto-Kartvelian (family node)
notes: STRUCTURAL ANCESTRY NODE (not a modelled G2P target). Proto-Kartvelian is the reconstructed common ancestor of the Kartvelian (South Caucasian) family, including Georgian. It exists here only so the ancestry / phylogenetic-distance metrics of the modern varieties that reference it have a node to resolve to; NO phonology is claimed or reconstructed and the minimal grapheme set is a placeholder (afa.json / trk.json stub pattern).

sources.author: Klimov, G. A.
sources.title: Etymological Dictionary of the Kartvelian Languages
sources.notes: Reference for Kartvelian reconstruction (structural node only).
